        rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
        cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
        print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], children={n['children']}")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nLeft panel:")
for i in range(30, 37):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][8:28]}")
print("\nGap area:")
for i in range(28, 36):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][24:42]}")
</parameter>
</function>
